concerns.description: Image placeholder ratio 85%: 22/26 images are broken/missing (transparent 1x1 placeholders)
Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: One minor text difference was identified on Page 13 in the 'FY2026 Cyber Security Remediation Initiative (CRI)' section. The source text states '...Union County 911 were approved on February 28, 2025', but the JSON output omits the phrase 'were approved', resulting in '...Union County 911 on February 28, 2025'. Although the surrounding context and related text on Page 7 clarify that these were approvals, the omission is a literal fidelity error.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: FY2026 CRI proposals from Johnston County 911, Perquimans-Gates 911, and Union County 911 were approved on February 28, 2025.
concerns.output_quote: FY2026 CRI proposals from Johnston County 911, Perquimans-Gates 911, and Union County 911 on February 28, 2025.

concerns.analysis: The output generally maintains a logical heading hierarchy (H2 for sections, H3/H4 for sub-sections). However, on page 18 under 'Education Station', the course title 'NENA: Reset, Refuel, Restore Your Purpose in 911' is distinctly styled as a heading in the source, comparable to the 'O2X Webinar Series' below it. While the O2X items are correctly identified as H4 headings, the NENA title is merged into a paragraph, creating an inconsistency in the semantic structure of the training list.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: NENA: Reset, Refuel, Restore Your Purpose in 911 (Page 18, centered heading above course description)
concerns.output_quote: "text": "NENA: Reset, Refuel, Restore Your Purpose in 911\nThe 911 Board is pleased to announce..."

concerns.analysis: While most contact links (emails) are correctly identified as interactive href objects, the external URL on page 11 is rendered only as a text string. Per the requirement that URLs clearly visible in the PDF should be clickable, this is a missing link defect.
concerns.location: A Word from Your RCs..., element index 5 (Page 11)
